assessment.note: She names a clear pattern: execution is happening, but she is not shaping decisions early, which is a strong negative clarity signal and points toward stakeholder influence.

new_queue.label: Early decisions
new_queue.name: Where specifically are decisions getting made before you shape them?
new_queue.description: Pins the pattern to a concrete decision point before moving the arc forward.

new_queue.label: Impact evidence
new_queue.name: What piece of work best shows the impact you think you had this quarter?
new_queue.description: Forces a concrete example of impact rather than a general claim.

new_queue.label: Visibility signal
new_queue.name: What did you do this quarter to make your work visible to the right stakeholders?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether she is actively raising signal or relying on others to notice.

new_queue.label: Friction point
new_queue.name: Where did cross-functional friction slow you down most this quarter?
new_queue.description: Identifies the specific collaboration point where execution met resistance.

new_queue.label: Escalation judgment
new_queue.name: What kind of call did you hold too long before escalating this quarter?
new_queue.description: Probes decision-making under uncertainty and calibration of when to pull in help.

new_queue.label: Next-quarter focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to work on first over the next quarter?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete priority and commitment without introducing a new thread.
